[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01101100 4
1 00110010 3
2 11101100 5
3 00100100 2
4 00101100 3
5 01100000 2
6 01100000 2
7 00010010 2

01 10 00000000 a

56 65 01100010 3
67 76 01100000 2 match 5 6
70 07 10000000 1

35 53 00101100 3 match 4
